problem: Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure?
hypothesis: If Bose-Einstein condensate at higher temperature is applied to what, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Spectroscopic analysis with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
